body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Meditation reduces brain activity in the default mode network in children with active cancer and survivors.**. Pediatr Blood Cancer.. PMID: 35927934. DOI: 10.1002/pbc.29917. BACKGROUND: Mounting evidence demonstrates that meditation can lower pain and emotional distress in adults, and more recently, in children. Children may benefit from meditation given its accessibility across avariety of settings (e.g., surgical preparation).
